title: parinari costata subsp. costata
intro: Parinari costata subsp. costata is a plant species native to tropical Africa, commonly known as African Bloodwood or Red Ironwood. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the bark of the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it is also used in herbal preparations to support immune function and overall well-being.
